sentences.target: Je taille les rosiers ce matin.

translations.fr: Je taille les rosiers ce matin.
translations.en: I'm pruning the rose bushes this morning.
translations.de: Heute Morgen schneide ich die Rosensträucher.
translations.it: Stamattina poto i cespugli di rose.
translations.zh-Hans: 今天早上我在修剪玫瑰丛。
translations.yue: 我今朝早修剪玫瑰花叢。
translations.ru: Сегодня утром я обрезаю розовые кусты.
translations.pt: Estou podando as roseiras esta manhã.
translations.he: הבוקר אני גוזם את שיחי הוורדים.
translations.vi: Sáng nay tôi tỉa bụi hoa hồng.
translations.uk: Сьогодні вранці я обрізаю кущі троянд.
translations.hi: आज सुबह मैं गुलाब की झाड़ियों की छंटाई कर रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Σήμερα το πρωί κλαδεύω τις τριανταφυλλιές.
translations.nb: I dag tidlig beskjærer jeg rosebuskene.
translations.id: Pagi ini saya memangkas semak mawar.
translations.sv: I dag på morgonen beskär jag rosbuskarna.
translations.ro: În această dimineață tai tufele de trandafiri.
translations.da: Her til morgen beskærer jeg rosenbuskene.
translations.ja: 今朝はバラの茂みを剪定しています。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person singular; marks the speaker as the subject.
Main verb in present indicative, 1st person singular, agreeing with ‘Je’.
Definite article, plural; introduces the noun phrase that follows.
Common noun, plural; direct object of ‘taille’.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; modifies ‘matin’.
Common noun; forms the temporal complement ‘ce matin’.

sentences.target: Tu peux tailler ma barbe, s'il te plaît.
sentences.reading: /ty pø taje ma baʁb sil tə plɛ/

translations.fr: Tu peux tailler ma barbe, s'il te plaît.
translations.ipa: /ty pø taje ma baʁb sil tə plɛ/
translations.en: Can you trim my beard, please.
translations.de: Kannst du mir bitte den Bart trimmen?
translations.it: Puoi accorciarmi la barba, per favore?
translations.ko: 수염 좀 다듬어 줄 수 있어요?
translations.zh-Hans: 可以帮我修一下胡子吗？
translations.yue: 可唔可以幫我修下鬍鬚呀？
translations.pt: Você pode aparar minha barba, por favor?
translations.he: אתה יכול לקצר לי את הזקן, בבקשה?
translations.vi: Bạn có thể tỉa giúp tôi bộ râu được không?
translations.ar: هل يمكنك تشذيب لحيتي من فضلك؟
translations.nl: Kun je alsjeblieft mijn baard trimmen?
translations.uk: Можеш, будь ласка, підстригти мені бороду?
translations.hu: Meg tudnád igazítani a szakállamat, kérlek?
translations.hi: क्या आप मेरी दाढ़ी ट्रिम कर सकते हैं, कृपया?
translations.pl: Czy możesz przyciąć mi brodę, proszę?
translations.el: Μπορείς να μου περιποιήσεις τα γένια, σε παρακαλώ?
translations.nb: Kan du trimme skjegget mitt, vær så snill?
translations.sv: Kan du trimma mitt skägg, tack?
translations.ro: Poți să-mi tunzi barba, te rog?
translations.da: Kan du trimme mit skæg, tak?
translations.ja: ひげを整えてもらえますか。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 2nd person singular.
Main verb (modal-like), present indicative, 2nd person singular; selects an infinitive complement.
Infinitive verb; complement of ‘peux’; governs the direct object ‘ma barbe’.
Possessive determiner, 1st person singular, feminine singular; modifies ‘barbe’.
Common noun; direct object of the infinitive ‘tailler’.
Contraction of the subordinating conjunction ‘si’ (if) with the clitic subject pronoun ‘il’; introduces the clause ‘s’il te plaît’.
Clitic personal pronoun, 2nd person singular, indirect object (dative) of ‘plaît’ (plaire à qqn).
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; in the polite formula ‘s’il te plaît’.

sentences.target: On taille la haie avant l'hiver.

translations.fr: On taille la haie avant l'hiver.
translations.en: We trim the hedge before winter.
translations.es: Recortamos el seto antes del invierno.
translations.de: Wir schneiden die Hecke vor dem Winter.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在冬天之前修剪树篱。
translations.yue: 我哋喺入冬之前修剪樹籬。
translations.ru: Мы подрезаем живую изгородь перед зимой.
translations.pt: Aparamos a cerca-viva antes do inverno.
translations.he: אנחנו גוזמים את הגדר החיה לפני החורף.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi tỉa hàng rào cây trước mùa đông.
translations.ar: نقوم بتقليم السياج النباتي قبل الشتاء.
translations.nl: We snoeien de haag voor de winter.
translations.hu: A sövényt a tél előtt megmetszük.
translations.hi: हम सर्दियों से पहले झाड़ियों की बाड़ की छँटाई करते हैं.
translations.el: Κλαδεύουμε τον φράχτη πριν από τον χειμώνα.
translations.id: Kami memangkas pagar tanaman sebelum musim dingin.
translations.ro: Tundem gardul viu înainte de iarnă.
translations.ja: 冬の前に生け垣を刈り込みます。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite subject pronoun (often colloquial ‘we’); takes 3rd person singular agreement.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; agrees with ‘On’.
Definite article, feminine singular; introduces ‘haie’.
Common noun; direct object of ‘taille’.
Preposition introducing a temporal complement.
Noun ‘hiver’ with elided definite article ‘le’ attached (l’); object of the preposition ‘avant’.

sentences.target: Ils taillent leurs crayons pour l'école.

translations.fr: Ils taillent leurs crayons pour l'école.
translations.en: They sharpen their pencils for school.
translations.es: Sacan punta a sus lápices para la escuela.
translations.de: Sie spitzen ihre Bleistifte für die Schule an.
translations.it: Temperano le matite per la scuola.
translations.pt: Eles apontam os lápis para a escola.
translations.he: הם מחדדים את העפרונות לבית הספר.
translations.vi: Họ gọt bút chì để đi học.
translations.ar: هم يبرون أقلامهم من أجل المدرسة.
translations.nl: Ze slijpen hun potloden voor school.
translations.uk: Вони точать свої олівці для школи.
translations.hi: वे स्कूल के लिए अपनी पेंसिलें तेज करते हैं.
translations.pl: Oni ostrzą swoje ołówki do szkoły.
translations.el: Ακονίζουν τα μολύβια τους για το σχολείο.
translations.nb: De spisser blyantene sine til skolen.
translations.id: Mereka meraut pensil mereka untuk sekolah.
translations.sv: De vässar sina blyertspennor till skolan.
translations.da: De spidser deres blyanter til skolen.
translations.ja: 彼らは学校のために鉛筆を削ります。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, masculine plural; controls 3rd person plural agreement.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person plural; agrees with ‘Ils’.
Possessive determiner, 3rd person plural; modifies ‘crayons’.
Common noun, plural; direct object of ‘taillent’.
Preposition introducing a purpose/complement.
Noun ‘école’ with elided definite article ‘la’ attached (l’); object of the preposition ‘pour’.

वे स्कूल के लिए अपनी पेंसिलें तेज करते हैं.
